title: Uruguayan Pork Chops Skewers
description: Tender and juicy pork chops skewers, marinated in a buttery mixture and grilled to perfection, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, butter, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the pork chops to the marinade and mix well to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated pork chops onto skewers, leaving a small space between each chop.
Grill the skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving, garnished with chopped parsley.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
